name: QuantumScan PQC Scanner
description: Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) vulnerability scanner for GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket repositories. Detects ECDSA, RSA, AES-128, and other quantum-vulnerable algorithms. Returns EIP-7789 CBOM manifests aligned to NIST FIPS 203/204/205 migration targets.

apiKey.description: QuantumScan API key for authenticated scans (optional — free scans work without it)

apiUrl.description: Custom QuantumScan API base URL (default: https://quantumscan.io)
